name: VisaMerchant
description: Structure of a Visa merchant entity including identifiers, location, and category data

fields.name: visaMerchantId
fields.description: Unique Visa merchant identifier in the VisaNet network

fields.name: visaStoreId
fields.description: Unique store-level identifier within the merchant

fields.name: merchantName
fields.description: Legal business name of the merchant

fields.name: merchantCity
fields.description: City where the merchant is located

fields.name: merchantCategoryCode
fields.description: MCC - 4-digit code classifying the merchant's business type
